title: perityle socorrosensis
intro: Perityle socorrosensis is a type of plant that belongs to the daisy family, native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Perityle socorrosensis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and soothe digestive issues, making it a valuable herb in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of Perityle socorrosensis can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
